findings.evidence: `SymmetricEnergy.lean:118` already contains `energyIntegrand_zero_drift_comm_on`; the new declaration at `SymmetricCoerciveEnergy.lean:62` only calls `energyIntegrand_zero_drift_flip_eq_of_isSymm`.
findings.fix: Move it to `TauCeti/Analysis/PDE/SymmetricEnergy.lean` next to `energyIntegrand_zero_drift_comm_on`, which is the existing pointwise coefficient-field symmetry API.
findings.issue: `energyIntegrand_zero_drift_flip_eq_on` is a pure symmetry wrapper, not a symmetric/coercive package result.

findings.evidence: `EnergyForm.lean:112` and `EnergyForm.lean:118` define the existing `energyIntegrand_one_zero_zero_*` normal forms; `EnergyForm.lean:145` and `EnergyForm.lean:207` define the generic boundedness lemmas specialized by the new block at lines 98-126.
findings.fix: Move `energyIntegrand_one_zero_mass_apply`, `energyIntegrand_one_zero_mass_self`, `norm_energyIntegrand_one_zero_mass_apply_le`, and `opNorm_energyIntegrand_one_zero_mass_le` to `EnergyForm.lean` near the existing `energyIntegrand_one_zero_zero_*` and boundedness lemmas.
findings.issue: The shifted-Laplacian normal forms and boundedness lemmas are broadly useful base `energyIntegrand` facts, but this places them behind the later symmetric/coercive file.

findings.evidence: `SymmetricEnergy.lean:75` already has the identity-coefficient zero-drift symmetry lemma; `CoerciveEnergy.lean:150` and `CoerciveEnergy.lean:53` contain the zero-drift coercivity and product-norm lower-bound APIs used by the new declarations at lines 130-154.
findings.fix: Move `energyIntegrand_one_zero_mass_flip_eq` to `SymmetricEnergy.lean`; move `isCoercive_energyIntegrand_one_zero_mass` and `min_one_mass_mul_norm_sq_le_energyIntegrand_one_zero_mass_self` to `CoerciveEnergy.lean`, leaving only `energyIntegrand_one_zero_mass_flip_eq_and_isCoercive` in the combined file if desired.
findings.issue: The one-property shifted-Laplacian symmetry and coercivity/lower-bound facts are split across established homes, but are all hidden in the combined module.

summary: Several declarations are placed behind the new symmetric/coercive combined module even though they are single-property or base shifted-Laplacian facts with earlier canonical homes.
